function.name: final_result
function.arguments: {"is_legal":true,"action_type":"persuasion","summary":"The goblins back away from the ruined camp.","reasoning_summary":"Talia offers a credible nonviolent exit and succeeds at the check.","roll_requests":[{"owner":"player","visibility":"public","expression":"1d20+5","purpose":"Persuasion check"}],"state_effects":[{"effect_type":"append_public_event","target":"encounter:goblin-camp","value":"The goblins back away from the ruined camp."},{"effect_type":"set_phase","target":"encounter:goblin-camp","value":"encounter_complete"},{"effect_type":"set_encounter_outcome","target":"encounter:goblin-camp","value":"de-escalated"}],"rule_references":[]}
